Brand Agent Workspace

This root is the control entry for your current domain skeleton. Open one of the routes below to run the full agent loop.

Chat-first flowConfidence gateJob-based buildPack outputs

Primary

Create Chat

Run interview, confidence gate, top-3 generation, revisions, and final approval.

Open Route

Review

Create Preview

Inspect discussion state with jobId and packId query values before final checks.

Open Route

Ops

Admin Jobs

Open Route

Runtime Flow

Agent Loop Summary

  1. 1Interview input and confidence score
  2. 2Clarify if confidence is below gate
  3. 3Generate candidate top-3 set
  4. 4Discuss with sliders and constraints
  5. 5Approve and run build job
  6. 6Open final pack and verify outputs
